_comment: Machine-readable batch tracker. Update after each session. The routine reads next_stage and the service_city_matrix / city_expansion / country_expansion blocks to pick the next uncompleted block.
autonomy: Fully autonomous. One block per run, full QA gate, commit to master, post live links to Slack as a record. No approval step, no wait-for-go, no stop condition. When one expansion track completes, move to the next in the order under build_order.

blog.cannibalisation_note: Do not blog topics already covered by service x city deep pages. Blog covers angles the deep pages do not: cost breakdowns, regulatory explainers, comparisons, question-led safety guides.

service_city_matrix._goal: THE GROWTH ENGINE. Every service silo across every live city. 7 services x 250 target cities = ~1,750 service-city deep pages. Currently all 7 services cover the top 60 cities. Expanding to full city set, one service-city block of 10 pages per run.

bodyguard-hire.covered: all 278 live cities (batch28 added in batch37)
bodyguard-hire.remaining: SD/EP need batch28 update (done); RS/ES/CPO/SAT still to cover 10 batch28 cities

security-drivers.covered: all 278 live cities (batch28 added in batch37)
security-drivers.remaining: RS/ES/CPO/SAT still to cover 10 batch28 cities

executive-protection.covered: all 278 live cities (batch28 added in batch37)
executive-protection.remaining: RS/ES/CPO/SAT still to cover 10 batch28 cities

residential-security.covered: all 278 live cities (batch28 gap closed in batch38)

event-security.covered: all 278 live cities (batch28 gap closed in batch38)

close-protection-officers.covered: all 278 live cities (batch28 gap closed in batch38)

secure-airport-transfers.covered: all 278 live cities (batch28 gap closed in batch38)

service_city_matrix.expansion_order: For each service in the services list, build that service across the next 10 live cities not yet covered for it (read cities from site/content/cities/, skip any service-city slug already on disk). Rotate which service is extended each block so the matrix fills evenly: bodyguard-hire batch, then security-drivers batch, then executive-protection, residential-security, event-security, close-protection-officers, secure-airport-transfers, then back to bodyguard-hire for the next 10 cities. One 10-page block per run.
service_city_matrix.current_coverage_note: Batch38 (6 Jul 2026): RS/ES/CPO/SAT x batch28 cities (Bologna/Genoa/Malaga/Zaragoza/Rennes/Bordeaux/Eindhoven/Utrecht/Ghent/Nantes, 40 pages) closes the matrix gap -- all 7 services now cover all 278 pre-batch29 cities. City expansion batch29 (10 new cities: Palma de Mallorca/Montpellier/Lille/Strasbourg/Dusseldorf/Stuttgart/Leipzig/Bremen/Liege/Antwerp) also built. Cities live: 288. Total pages: 2325. batch29 cities not yet covered by any service (next run).

city_expansion._goal: Grow the city universe to 260+. Each city unlocks 7 new service-city matrix pages, so cities are high-value additions. Build the next 5-10 cities per block from the P4 city queue (next-tier business-travel and high-net-worth destinations: regional capitals, financial centres, and resource/energy hubs not yet covered).
city_expansion._note_p4_queue: Batch29 (Palma de Mallorca/Montpellier/Lille/Strasbourg/Dusseldorf/Stuttgart/Leipzig/Bremen/Liege/Antwerp) complete (6 Jul 2026), bringing cities live to 288 against a target of 290. Next run should identify the final ~2-12 P4 candidates (or raise the target) before building further city expansion; matrix completion for batch28/batch29 cities takes priority in the meantime.

country_expansion._goal: Grow country hubs from 38 to ~120 so every city has a parent country hub and the site captures country-level close-protection queries. Build the next 5 country hubs per block for any country that has live cities but no hub yet.

build_order: 1. service_city_matrix: default every run. Extend the next service across its next 10 uncovered cities. This is the priority growth track.
2. city_expansion: when a service_city_matrix block for the current rotation is already committed, build the next 5-10 P4 cities (which then feed the matrix).
3. country_expansion: build the next 5 country hubs for countries with live cities but no hub.
4. blog: when the next matrix/city/country block is already committed, build the next 5-article blog batch from the keyword matrix (non-cannibalising angles).

pages._count_note: 2275 prior + 50 new (batch38: RS/ES/CPO/SAT x batch28 cities [40] + city expansion batch29 [10]). All 7 services cover 278 cities; cities live 288 (batch29 cities not yet covered by any service).

engine_alignment.4_internal_link_graph: DONE (floor). Re-run scripts/rebuild_link_graph.py after each matrix batch so new service-city pages are linked from their city and service-silo parents.
engine_alignment.5_qa_seo_quality_gate: GREEN. 0 errors across all 50 batch38 pages (qa_audit.py, 0 errors site-wide across 2425 pages; advisory warnings pre-existing plus expected 'city page has no body links' warnings on the 10 new city pages, consistent with the established city-page schema).

cannibalisation_rule: Do not blog on topics already covered by service x city deep pages. The deep pages ARE the definitive content for {service}/{city}. Blog covers angles the deep pages do not.
next_stage: BATCH38 COMPLETE (6 Jul 2026): RS/ES/CPO/SAT x batch28 cities (Bologna/Genoa/Malaga/Zaragoza/Rennes/Bordeaux/Eindhoven/Utrecht/Ghent/Nantes, 40 pages) -- all 7 services now cover all 278 pre-batch29 cities. City expansion batch29 (10 new cities: Palma de Mallorca/Montpellier/Lille/Strasbourg/Dusseldorf/Stuttgart/Leipzig/Bremen/Liege/Antwerp). Cities live: 288. Total: 2325 pages. Next: 7 services x batch29 cities (70 pages) + blog batch9 + identify next city-expansion candidates (2325/290 target nearly reached).
